info.title: The Neural Ledger API
info.description: The Neural Ledger API for source-linked news, market context, saved searches, feeds, and a static no-key developer sample.

get.description: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 schema for this API surface.
Returns the API key metadata, resolved plan, and current monthly usage.

post.description: Runs the same Ledger AI Terminal investigation used by the website and returns an AI answer, evidence citations, conversation metadata, normal API usage, and the separate 50/month Ledger AI question usage.

question.description: Natural-language question for Ledger AI Terminal. Alias: message, prompt, or query.
question.example: what are the most important news in Turkey today?

conversationId.description: Existing Ledger AI conversation id to continue. Alias: conversation_id.

messages.description: Optional user/assistant message history; the latest user message is used as the question.

post.description: Alias of /v1/ai-terminal for chat-oriented clients. Each successful request reserves one Ledger AI Terminal question before model work begins.

question.description: Natural-language question for Ledger AI Terminal. Alias: message, prompt, or query.
question.example: what are the most important news in Turkey today?

conversationId.description: Existing Ledger AI conversation id to continue. Alias: conversation_id.

messages.description: Optional user/assistant message history; the latest user message is used as the question.

get.description: Returns a bounded, cacheable, synthetic CC0 sample dataset for no-account evaluation. This operation never queries or falls through to production member data.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across sample title, excerpt, category, and country.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Static sample stories per page; maximum 20.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned as page.next_cursor.

get.description: Returns source-linked stories with cursor or offset pagination, filters, field shaping, and normalized metadata.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number, starting at 1.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Stories per page. Alias: limit. Maximum 100.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned as page.next_cursor for the next page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based offset. Ignored when cursor is supplied.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated response fields to return. The id field is always included when present.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Comma-separated detail groups. Use full for all fields, or sources,claims,impactDetails,body for selected heavy fields.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Feed order: pipeline for newest stories or popular for 12-hour freshness-bucketed popularity.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: G20 country filter from the story passive entities.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Normalized Neural Ledger story category.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: Passive entity text or id filter.

parameters.name: impact_path
parameters.description: Impact path text, id, or lookup token filter.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Normalized story tag filter.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Full-text query across titles, summaries, entities, tags, and impact paths.

parameters.name: published_since
parameters.description: Return stories published at or after this ISO date/time.

parameters.name: published_until
parameters.description: Return stories published at or before this ISO date/time.

parameters.name: updated_since
parameters.description: Return stories updated at or after this ISO date/time.

parameters.name: updated_until
parameters.description: Return stories updated at or before this ISO date/time.

get.description: Returns one story by story id or the title slug used by article pages.

parameters.name: idOrSlug
parameters.description: Story id, title slug, entity value, impact path value, ticker, or saved-search id depending on the endpoint.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated response fields to return.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Detail groups to include when not returning a full story.

get.description: Alias of /v1/news/{id-or-slug} for story-oriented clients.

parameters.name: idOrSlug
parameters.description: Story id, title slug, entity value, impact path value, ticker, or saved-search id depending on the endpoint.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated response fields to return.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Detail groups to include when not returning a full story.

get.description: Lists API-key owner scoped saved searches.

post.description: Creates a saved search with filters and optional webhook alert settings.

get.description: Returns one saved search by id.

parameters.name: idOrSlug
parameters.description: Story id, title slug, entity value, impact path value, ticker, or saved-search id depending on the endpoint.
